title: Eigenanalysis of Covariance Matrices
description: Sample covariance matrices from vectors of correlated samples, their eigenstructure, and the Karhunen-Loeve bridge between random processes and eigendecomposition.
objectives: Explain how a sample covariance matrix arises from a vector of lagged or multi-channel samples
Interpret a covariance matrix's eigenvectors and eigenvalues as its principal directions and the variances along them
Describe the Karhunen-Loeve expansion as the bridge between random processes and eigendecomposition, and why eigenvalue problems show up in subspace-based detectors

lessons.title: From a signal to a covariance matrix
